introSection.title: A creative tool for creating virtual exhibitions
introSection.subtitle: INDIHU Exhibition is a tool for creating multimedia rich virtual exhibitions with interactive elements. Exhibitions Individuals and teams can create exhibitions on any topic. Visitors expect you to be online and this tool allows you to do that.

functionalitySection.title: Functionality
functionalitySection.subtitle: Easily create impressive online exhibits that are accessible to visitors on the web. INDIHU Exhibition allows you to combine images, texts, photo galleries, videos, maps with other options. Include small interactive games in the exhibition.
functionalitySection.func1Text: It will allow you to create virtual exhibitions without having to understand web design.
functionalitySection.func2Text: It offers multimedia content – videos, images, animations, music, games and more.
functionalitySection.func3Text: You can collaborate with several creators on the creation of the exhibition.
functionalitySection.func5Text: Easy sharing to visitors and co-authors.
functionalitySection.func6Text: Create interactive exhibitions with a few clicks.

selectedExhibitionsSection.title: Selected exhibitions
selectedExhibitionsSection.subtitle: Get inspired by exhibitions created by other creators. Find ideas for your own exhibitions and see how colorful exhibitions can be. Samples are continuously updated.

registrationSection.title: Start creating exhibitions!
registrationSection.subtitle: Easily create impressive online exhibits that are accessible to visitors on the web. INDIHU Exhibition allows you to combine images, texts, photo galleries, videos, maps with other options. Include small interactive games in the exhibition.

registerForm.formSubtitle: Start creating visual exhibitions for free!
